creator: dereckson@gmail.com
text:
From bug 262148:

> ^Triage: Quarterly git is 2.34.1, quarterly git-review also affected, MFH

(Thanks Kubilay to have noticed the quarterly Git version)

So we would need to include this version of git-review in quarterly to maintain compatibility with devel/git package, as that Git version dropped a deprecated option used in git-review until 2.1.0, and fixed here.
